sourceAuthority.scopeDecision: Only independently source-confirmed, browser-safe read contracts were admitted. Visual-runtime evidence was not used as Web API authority.

blockedCapabilities: live transport without a complete browser contract

architectureResult.outboundValidation: Strict Zod request schemas validate every confirmed request body.
architectureResult.responseValidation: Endpoint envelopes and DTOs are Zod-validated before domain mapping.
architectureResult.cancellation: TanStack Vue Query AbortSignal values are forwarded to Axios.
architectureResult.timeouts: The project-owned client enforces an 8000 ms default and a 3000-30000 ms validated range.
architectureResult.crossOriginBehavior: Unconfirmed browser cross-origin access fails closed before a network request.

governanceResult.obsoleteArtifactDeletion: Superseded active and historical API authorities were deleted or reconciled.
governanceResult.automatedTests: No test files, fixtures, snapshots, coverage, or test runner infrastructure were created or retained.

browserValidation.surface: Codex in-app browser against the freshly built Vite preview
browserValidation.interaction: Clicking the visible authentication-information link changed the route to /pgnViewer/login.

commits.subject: docs(architecture): 清除废弃 Web API 架构权威
feat(api): 建立可验证的赛事只读 Web API 边界

disclosedDeviation.effect: A pre-existing ignored .serena generated-cache directory was accidentally deleted during source-status cleanup.
disclosedDeviation.recovery: No usable local snapshot was available; the source root was not written again.
disclosedDeviation.browserControl: The in-app browser's embedded DOM inspection API was used transiently; no Playwright dependency, runner, script, suite, or file was added.
